text: The AI summary is useful, but export to PDF is missing.
Reports are slow when I filter by class and date.
I love the lesson suggestions, but the rubric explanation is unclear.
The chat answer is helpful and fast for homework practice.
Exporting reports to PDF would save time for parent meetings.
The dashboard is confusing when there are many school groups.
Rubric feedback is useful but needs clearer examples.
Filtering reports by date causes an error sometimes.
